subsubcategories.name: Elevators
subsubcategories.description: Dental elevators are used to loosen and luxate teeth before extraction. Available in straight, curved, and root tip patterns.

subsubcategories.name: Surgical Forceps
subsubcategories.description: Includes dissecting, dressing, tissue, and hemostatic forceps for precise handling and control during oral surgery.

subsubcategories.name: Bone Instruments
subsubcategories.description: Includes bone rongeurs, bone cutting forceps, bone holding forceps, and bone crushers used in oral surgical procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Retractors & Mouth Gags
subsubcategories.description: Retractors and mouth gags are dental instruments used to hold back soft tissues and keep the mouth open, providing better visibility and access during oral examinations and surgical procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Scissors
subsubcategories.description: Includes Gum, Surgical, Ligature, Bandage Scissors

subsubcategories.name: Needle Holders & Cases
subsubcategories.description: Includes needle holders and cases for secure handling and storage of surgical needles during oral procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Syringes
subsubcategories.description: Includes dental syringes used for administering anesthetics and irrigation during oral surgical procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Scalers
subsubcategories.description: Dental scalers used for removing plaque, tartar, and stains from teeth during dental procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Curretes
subsubcategories.description: Dental curettes used for scaling and root planing to remove plaque and calculus from teeth and beneath the gumline.

subsubcategories.name: Rubber Dam Forceps & Punch
subsubcategories.description: Includes rubber dam forceps and punches used for placing clamps and creating holes in dental dams during restorative procedures.

products.name: Ivory light Rubber Dam Clamp Forceps

subsubcategories.name: Rubber Dam Frames
subsubcategories.description: Includes rubber dam frames used to support and stabilize dental dams during restorative and endodontic procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Rubber Dam Clamps
subsubcategories.description: Rubber Dam Clamps used to secure dental dams in place during restorative and endodontic procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Pliers
subsubcategories.description: Orthodontic pliers used for bending, adjusting, and shaping wires and appliances in orthodontic procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Cotton & Dressing Tweezers
subsubcategories.description: Cotton and dressing tweezers used for handling cotton, gauze, and small materials during dental diagnostic and treatment procedures.

subsubcategories.name: Dental Measurement Tools
subsubcategories.description: Includes dental gauges, calipers, and measurement tools used for precise assessment and diagnostic procedures in dentistry.

products.name: Iwanson Caliper for metal
products.description: Iwanson spring caliper used for accurate measurements for metal and porcelain.

details.overview: Iwanson spring caliper used for accurate measurements for metal and porcelain.

products.name: Krekeler Sliding Caliper
products.description:
Krekeler Sliding Caliper, 80mm Scale

OUT shows the determined outside dimension (⌀ 1.5 mm)

IN shows the inner diameter.

details.overview:
Krekeler Sliding Caliper, 80mm Scale

OUT shows the determined outside dimension (⌀ 1.5 mm)

IN shows the inner diameter.

products.name: Boley Gauge
products.description: The Boley Gauge helps in determining tooth dimensions of length, width, and thickness in millimeter increments. It is used for measuring teeth and spaces. The flat end is good for measuring teeth size and distance of spaces in the mouth.

details.overview: The Boley Gauge helps in determining tooth dimensions of length, width, and thickness in millimeter increments. It is used for measuring teeth and spaces. The flat end is good for measuring teeth size and distance of spaces in the mouth.
